title: Equipment Compare Keybind Fix
description: Fix the issue of key binding with equipment compare mixin
body:
Fixed in latest equipment compare

Remove equipment compare weird keybind mixin  
Don't know the reason of the mixin. Need figure out if it is causing issues.  
  
fix https://github.com/AHilyard/EquipmentCompare/issues/29
